race.comment: Lots of these look close to a win. HOLDING CAPTIVE (6) was strongly fancied on debut and led until the final bound before being run down. Can only be improved and should go close again. TSAVO (7) has had one campaign for the new yard placing two of three runs including the last time when resuming. Expected to go close again fresh. CUMULATE (9) was in the market on debut and sat second throughout before boxing on to place. Fitter again and can feature in the finish. GALACTIC FORCE (5) placed fresh on heavy ground then was beaten only two lengths latest when heavily bet. Has the blinkers added and should run well despite a tricky draw. KELLERSLEA (11) is a Hayes three-year-old filly (North Pacific - Sizzling Belle) making debut. Fitter for three jump-outs and worth watching closely.
